title: Connect Your Team With Hybrid & Virtual Magic Shows
description: Fun & Interactive Virtual & Hybrid Magic Shows to Connect Your Team/Guests With Mind-Bending Mentalism, Skillful Sleight of Hand, & Jaw-Dropping Illusions Delivered Directly to Your Screens.

blocks.html: Companies who trust Robert Strong to entertain their executives, teams, and customers virtually:
Here is a Video Sample of Robert’s Best Virtual Magic Shows:

Robert Strong is The Best Virtual Magician for Corporate Events

Robert created an interactive virtual magic show for small and large groups and remote teams. Robert’s virtual show won the Adam Award for Best Energy and Pace. Not only is Adam Cheyer a co-founder of Siri, but he is also a magician featured on Penn & Teller Fool Us and has seen literally hundreds of virtual magic shows.

From meticulous planning, production, and tech to the writing, performance, and improvisation, every element of Robert’s show is stunning. Here, you can see the difference between a webcam and Robert’s professional studio, which has a 3-camera setup with 4 K capabilities, lighting, and background for your online event.
Robert can perform virtual magic for events on any video meeting platform, including Zoom, Google Meet, Cisco WebEx, and Microsoft Teams

Robert is flexible and can customize his show for you!

blocks.html: Captivate and Connect With Your Customers Through Robert Strong’s Marketing Content Creation

Robert uses his background as a comedian, juggler, and magician to execute jaw-dropping white label content creation for companies. Unlike most content creation agencies, Robert uses his skills as a performer to create unique and personalized video marketing content for your company and audience.

Robert and his team help your organization:

  • Write the script

  • Build the graphics

  • Shoot the video

  • Do the editing

So your team has ready-to-go marketing videos that fit your messaging and bring in tons of new customers.

Robert’s 35+ years of experience as a performer and 15+ years of experience as a trade show magician make him the best video salesman your customers can’t take their eyes away from. As a comedy magician, Robert is blends clean comedy with astounding magic tricks to produce fun videos that your company will love.

Frequently Asked Questions for Virtual Magician Robert Strong and His Content Creation:

What exactly is a virtual magic show?

A virtual magic show is a live performance where a magician amazes people with jaw-dropping illusions, mind-bending mentalism, and seemingly impossible sleight of hand, all streamed live to your guests through your chosen platforms like Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, and more.

What can be expected from Robert Strong's virtual magic shows?

Robert leveraged his degree in filmmaking to build a three (4k) camera studio in his home, complete with lighting, sound, special effects, and surprise reveals that have been hiding in plain sight the entire show. With Robert online, everyone turns on their cameras and everyone participates in almost every routine. Plus he teaches everyone how to do a magic trick at home using everyday household objects. Your guests will feel extra connected because they share in creating the magic together. All shows are personalized, so no two shows are the same.

Who can enjoy a virtual magic show?

Anyone with an internet connection and a sense of wonder! Virtual magic shows are perfect for your C-suite executives, your entire work team, and your customers. So, if you want to boost team morale and engagement or share your solutions with potential clients, you can do that with a virtual magician who sparks conversation, laughter, and memories. Beyond just being a virtual magician for corporate events, Robert’s interactive routines and age-appropriate humor make for a personalized virtual magic show that wows audiences at any special event.

What can I expect during a virtual magic show?

The exact format will vary depending on your specifications. Robert creates bespoke experiences for each of his clients. Most of Robert’s virtual shows include:

  • Introductions and warm-up: The magician Robert Strong will get to know your audience members and set the tone for the performance.

  • Amazing magic tricks: Prepare to be amazed, delighted, and thoroughly entertained by a variety show filled with laughs, gasps, and applause.

  • Audience interaction: Robert is an expert at keeping everyone engaged, even through a screen, with interactive tricks that encourage participation.

  • Wrap-up and farewell: Robert Strong will leave you with a sense of wonder and even teach a trick you can do at home online or in-person.

How much does a virtual magic show cost?

Great question, it all depends on the date, time, show length, number of guests, the amount of personalization, and your goals. So, please provide as much information about your event(s) as possible when contacting Robert.

What is an interstitial or marketing video?

Robert’s interstitials are handcrafted shorts that stand out during your virtual or in-person events. Hiring Robert is a way for your organization to outsource content creation to a professional magician and entertainer who keeps your audience engaged during the transitions and breaks in an event.

What can be expected from Robert Strong's interstitials?

Robert leveraged his degree in filmmaking to build a three (4k) camera studio in his home, complete with lighting, sound, special effects, and surprise reveals that will stun your audience. During in-person events, Robert’s interstitials keep people off their phones and ready to continue with the show.

What makes Robert’s marketing videos different?

Unlike most content creation agencies, Robert is a full-time professional magician who has 35+ years of engaging audiences. With his background in trade shows, he’s a master of adding your messaging to his magic so your customers are dying to buy. Plus, he handles everything from scriptwriting to editing, so you receive amazing videos that stand out from other studios or AI content creation services.

What can Robert customize his videos for?

Robert can create personalized videos for any setting with a screen:

  • Event Introductions or Outros: Jump-start your event and move your customers to the edge of their seats with a magical start or end to your event!

  • Social Media Content: Don’t just use a content creation agency; brighten your followers’ feed with a magical video on their LinkedIn or Facebook feed.

  • Advertising Videos: Attract new customers with an advertising video from Robert that stands out and sells your product.

  • Email Marketing Content: Robert creates white-label content so you can embed the video directly into your customer emails with your branding and messaging.

  • Internal Company Videos: Robert has been making kids are magic videos for years, where he does culture interviews with your employees’ kids! He gets the real scoop on what kids think their parents do. Everyone in your organization will adore and connect with these heartwarming and funny videos.

How much does a video from Robert cost?

Great question, but it all depends on the length, production costs, amount of personalization, and your goals. So, please provide as much information about your request as possible when contacting Robert.

Contact him now!
